hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(endswith(".rb"))'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then bundle exec rubocop -A --stderr "$file" || exit 2; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(endswith(".rs"))'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$file"); while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/Cargo.toml" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ -f "$dir/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo fmt --manifest-path "$dir/Cargo.toml" -- "$file" || exit 2; fi; fi
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(test("\\.(rb|rbs)$"))'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then bundle exec steep check >&2 || exit 2; fi

cargo clippy --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets -q -- -D warnings >&2 || exit 2; cargo clippy --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/wasm/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets -q -- -D warnings >&2 || exit 2; cargo clippy --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/wasm/kobako-baker/Cargo.toml" --all-targets -q -- -D warnings >&2 || exit 2; if rustc --target wasm32-wasip1 --print sysroot >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/vendor/mruby/build/wasi/lib/libmruby.a" ]; then MRUBY_LIB_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/vendor/mruby/build/wasi/lib" WASI_SDK_PATH="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/vendor/wasi-sdk" cargo clippy --target wasm32-wasip1 --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/wasm/Cargo.toml" --workspace -q -- -D warnings >&2 || exit 2; fi

RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo doc --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/Cargo.toml" --workspace --no-deps --document-private-items -q >&2 || exit 2; RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo doc --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/wasm/Cargo.toml" --workspace --no-deps --document-private-items -q >&2 || exit 2; RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo doc --manifest-path "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/wasm/kobako-baker/Cargo.toml" --no-deps --document-private-items -q >&2 || exit 2

hooks.statusMessage: Running bundle exec rake (compile + test + rubocop + steep)
